title: Teaching surfaces document the none sentinel
action: Per no-test-repos D3 (decision 55b951e1). (1) AGENTS.block.md item 16 tail + root byte-parallel: after the capture sentence add — a project that deliberately runs no tests records commands.verify: 'none' (and/or test: 'none'); every test gate then reports itself disabled in one loud line instead of running; absence still means capture-them-soon. (2) bee-planning :122 block + bee-executing cap-evidence block: in a none-declared repo, cell verify is 'none' and cap evidence is the diff-backed outcome with the recorded waiver note — never invent a fake check to satisfy the field. (3) docs/config-reference.md commands section: a 'Projects without tests' sub-note (sentinel semantics, loud-skip list, how to re-enable) + the per-language table gains a 'no tests' row; .bee/config-sample.json _doc.commands gains one sentence for the sentinel (keep sample values real commands; zero-validation-problem must hold — run scripts/test_config_samples_safe.mjs). (4) knowledge R4 gains the sentinel sentence; bee knowledge index; knowledge check green. Mirrors regen + release_manifest --write + impact_registry --check.

truths: sample still validates with zero problems

verify: node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/test_config_samples_safe.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: sentinel documented on all six surfaces (AGENTS twins, planning, executing, config-reference incl. no-tests row, sample _doc, knowledge R4); parity+samples+render+manifest+registry+knowledge green
trace.verify_output: doctrine_parity: PASS (23 count claims agree); skill_render: 27 passed 0 failed; config_samples_safe: 9/9 passed; release_manifest --check: 503 file(s) match; impact_registry --check: up to date. Plus: knowledge check 136 concepts/155 files 0 errors 0 warnings; knowledge index --check 18 index files 0 stale.
